title: Province threatens to remove Calgary and Edmonton bike lanes
notes: CP Apr 22 2025 via ConstructConnect — Dreeshen calls on Edmonton/Calgary to remove bike lanes from 'key roadways.' Cites traffic congestion and population growth. Wrote specific letter to Edmonton councillor about 132 Ave project ($96M, already under construction). Province didn't fund that project but says it has a say because it funds other roads. Wants 'goodwill' removal before threatening legislation. Bike Edmonton: 'stay in your lane.' NDP: 'making an issue out of nothing.' Anchors EVT-064. NOTE: date corrected to April 2025 (not July).
